core_principles: Fusion: Air Traffic Control meets High-End Fintech
Density: High data density, low visual noise
Contrast: Critical alerts must pop against deep dark backgrounds
Precision: 1px borders, technical markers, monospace numbers

usage_rules.headings: Use Chivo for all page titles and card headers. Weight: 700 or 900. Tracking: tight.
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for labels, descriptions, and general text.
usage_rules.numbers: ALWAYS use JetBrains Mono for metrics, counters, and tabular data. This is non-negotiable for the 'monitoring' feel.

layout.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed Left) + Main Content Area

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 shadow-none rounded-none relative
cards.decoration: Add a 1px accent line at the top of active cards (border-t-2 border-primary).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide

inputs.classes: bg-secondary/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary rounded-sm font-mono text-sm

charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines if possible or make them extremely subtle (stroke='#333'). Use custom tooltips with glassmorphism.

maps.implementation: Use a placeholder div with a dark map image background and overlay 'Zone' markers using absolute positioning.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md' for sticky headers and floating panels.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'border-white/5' for subtle separation. Avoid heavy borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Avoid drop shadows. Use 'inner glow' or border highlights for depth.
visual_enhancers.animations: Micro-interactions only. No swooping page transitions. Fast fade-ins (duration-200).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force DARK MODE in 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css'. Do not create a light mode toggle.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout' component with a fixed sidebar and scrollable main content area.
4. DATA: Create a mock data service ('/services/mockData.js') to simulate VMS streams, people counts, and queue lengths.
5. DASHBOARD: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the main dashboard. Use the CCTV images as backgrounds for camera widgets.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts for Age/Gender distribution (Pie Chart) and Hourly Traffic (Area Chart).
7. ALERTS: Implement conditional rendering for capacity alerts. If count > capacity, card border turns RED.
8. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
